---
title: "About"
image: me.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
---

Mathew is a fourth-year finance student at the University of Alberta who is passionate about energy, risk management, and building systems.

In his role at SGI, he automated over 50 annual hours spent on reporting data. Within 2 months of employment Mathew was tasked with leading and training his team of 9 colleagues through a major software transition.

In his first two weeks at CNRL, Mathew learned how to read engineering drawings from all disciplines and completed a LEM analysis of a project worth over \$5 million. By the end of his work term, he was collaborating with engineers to sharpen estimates on projects worth over \$50 million.

In his final two years of studies, Mathew has focused his learning on data science and risk management. He has earned an average GPA across 9 finance courses of 3.87/4.00 while working part-time as an insurance underwriting analyst, teaching assistant, and finance tutor.

Mathew is seeking opportunities to grow his skillset and work on impactful teams in the energy sector.
